# ADAPTOVATE CV Studio - AI-Assisted CV Drafting Platform

## Project Overview
A modern SaaS application shell for ADAPTOVATE consulting to help teams generate tailored consultant CVs aligned to client RFP requirements and modeled on high-quality CV examples.

## Stack
- Next.js 14+ with App Router
- React 18+
- TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS
- shadcn/ui components
- Lucide React icons

## Branding Guidelines
- Clean, premium, modern consulting aesthetic
- Minimalist, executive-style interface
- White/off-white background with dark text
- Black/charcoal primary accents
- Strategic blue (#2563eb) as accent color
- Generous whitespace and high-end B2B SaaS feel

## Key Features (Shell/Placeholder)
1. Dashboard with recent projects and metrics
2. New Project workflow
3. RFP input and analysis
4. CV example upload and parsing
5. CV generation workspace
6. Generated CV library
7. Settings and admin pages

## Implementation Guidelines
- All AI functionality is placeholder/mock
- Use TODO comments for future features
- Structure for easy team handoff
- Enterprise-grade UI polish
- Responsive design
- Clean component architecture
